rationale: A security researcher filed a private vulnerability report via GitHub Security Advisories for velox-community/velox-stream. The sender is notifications@github.com and the body contains a GHSA identifier in the subject line along with a concrete heap-exhaustion vulnerability, affected versions, and reproduction steps. The project uses a ghsa-inbox intake model with no forwarder relay, so there is no ASF forwarder preamble or relay credit line — that absence is correct and expected for this non-ASF profile. The message is a genuine import candidate and must be classified as Report.
